## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / adapter
- [ ] New profile or rules

- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] New rules have `ucisa_benchmark_ref` populated
- [ ] PII redaction verified for any new log paths
- [ ] No secrets committed (run `pnpm audit` locally)
- [ ] DESIGN.md updated if architecture changed
